ucchinna p. p.
1 Extirpated, destroyed, cut down or off; ucchinnāśrayakātareva kulaṭā gotrāṃtaraṃ śrīgartā  Mu. 6. 5. 
2 Abject, vile.
— nnaḥ Peace obtained by ceding valuable lands.
